SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 606 JUDGE: JOHN J. CONWAY CLERK: M.MELVIN REPORTER: COUNSEL OF RECORD: FOR PLAINTIFF: CLIFFORD E. FRIED, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT: BELKYS AVILA, PRO PER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD IN CHAMBERS; MATTER DID NOT SETTLE. JURY TRIAL CONFIRMED FOR DECEMBER 14, 1998 AT 9:00 IN DEPARTMENT 1, ROOM 220.

JUDGE DONALSON, MLYON-REPORTER, JWILLIS-MCGHEE, CLERK 11:05AM C/C FOR JURY TRIAL; CLIFFORD FRIED ATTY FOR PLTF; DEFT BELKYS AVILA IN PRO PER; ALSO PRESENT MARTHA VALLEJO SPANISH INTERP(NOT CERTIFIED) PRESENT; CASE SETTLES; TERMS OF STIP READ INTO RECORD AS FOLLOWS: PLTF ENTITLED TO RESTITUTION OF PREMISES LOCATED AT 424 JONES ST. #503 WHICH INCLUDES GARAGE/STORAGES AREAS; NO OTHER OCCUPANTS IN PREMISES AND ALL PERSONAL BELONGINGS TO BE REMOVED; WRIT TO ISSUE IMMED BUT STYD TO 1/4/99 AT 12 MIDNIGHT; IF DEFT VACATES ON THAT DATE, PLTF WILL WAIVE ALL BACK RENT AND RENT DUE AT THAT TIME; PLTF WILL RETURN SEC DEP OF $975. TO DEFT AFTER DEFT VACATES PREMISES ON/BEF 1/4/99; PLTF AGREES TO PREPARE NEUTRAL LETTER OF RECOMMENDATION; IF DEFT COMPLIES W/ALL TERMS OF STIP, PLTF WILL DISM ACTION; IF FAILURE TO COMPLY PLTF ENTITLED TO W/24HRS NOTICE TO DEFT AN EX-PARTE MOTION FOR IMMED POSSESSION AND MONEY JUDGMENT; PLTF TO PREPARE STIP
